title: Convert YAML List of Mappings to JSON Array of Objects
cap_description: Convert a YAML sequence of mappings to a JSON array of objects
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a YAML sequence of mappings into a JSON array of objects. Each YAML mapping becomes one JSON object. Use this when downstream caps expect JSON but the data is in YAML format.

## Inputs

A YAML sequence where each element is a mapping.

## Outputs

A JSON array of objects.

## Notes

- Semantically lossless for all YAML types that map to JSON.
- For the reverse, use [Convert JSON Array of Objects to YAML List of Mappings](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;list;record;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;record;textable;yaml").

args.arg_description: YAML sequence of mappings to convert
